description_long: This is a bright blue food truck with a large, stylized ice cream cone sculpture mounted on its roof, featuring three pastel-colored scoops. The truck has a boxy, utilitarian shape with a cab at the front and a rectangular service area in the rear. One side of the truck features a striped awning in blue, purple, and white, shading a wide service window with a visible counter and colorful items displayed inside. The wheels are simple and black, and the front of the truck has a classic grille and headlights. The rear of the truck is plain, with the ice cream cone's base visible from above. The overall design is playful and inviting, clearly themed for selling ice cream or frozen treats.
description: A blue food truck with a large ice cream cone sculpture on top, striped awning, and a wide service window for selling treats.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cab, windshield, and the ice cream cone sculpture on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain side of the truck and the full length of the ice cream cone sculpture.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the truck and the base of the ice cream cone sculpture.
description_view_3: Service side view with a striped awning, open service window, and colorful items inside.
attribute_signage: large ice cream cone sculpture on roof, striped awning
